overall.description: A cinematic third-person scene from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai warrior standing idle beneath a massive cherry blossom tree in a rural Japanese landscape. Cherry blossom petals drift through the air as the character performs subtle idle animations, with traditional wooden village buildings visible in the background across a grassy field.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow under cherry blossom tree with traditional village in background

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior standing idle under the cherry blossom tree, performing subtle breathing and stance adjustments

notable_agents.action: villager sitting peacefully at the base of the tree near a stone lantern

entered.detail: massive tree with abundant white and pink blossoms, petals continuously falling
cluster of traditional wooden buildings with curved tiled roofs across the grassy field
traditional stone lantern at the base of the tree trunk

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands beneath a magnificent cherry blossom tree in full spring bloom, with petals drifting down through the clear midday air. Across the grassy meadow, a traditional Japanese village rests in the distance, while a lone villager sits in quiet contemplation at the tree's base beside a stone lantern.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene moment of stillness beneath a blooming cherry blossom tree that overlooks a distant rural village. It begins with a close focus on the samurai standing amidst a flurry of drifting pink petals under the clear midday sky. As the camera lingers, the view expands across the lush grassy meadow to reveal the traditional wooden architecture of a Japanese village resting in the distance. The scene then shifts slightly to encompass a lone villager sitting in quiet contemplation at the base of the tree beside a weathered stone lantern.
